g.data-notes: covered parking for 1 car(s), front of plot
Northeast Vastu zone, small dedicated space with proper ventilation and lighting; adjacent to living area.
Adjacent to kitchen, space for 6-seater dining table, sideboard for storage; east-facing window for morning light.
North Vastu zone, spacious layout for sectional sofa, coffee table, and entertainment unit; large windows for natural light.
floor 0 corridor — auto-injected by geometric rail
Internal staircase leading to first floor, located near foyer.
Southeast Vastu fire zone, single modular kitchen, L-counter + hob + sink on segregated wet wall, tall unit run, pass door to dining.
Accessible from corridor, includes shower, toilet, and basin.
Adjacent to kitchen, space for laundry and storage.
